description: Recto: Legal document, formally a testimony, possibly related to a business partnership (?). Beginning and end missing, as well as left and right margins and a section in the middle. Mentions b. Yiṣḥaq, known as b. ʿAshīr (or al-Shīr?), Alexandria, b. Ḥārith, and possibly a dispute over cash (ʿayn). Verso: Monumental Arabic script, possibly a decree fragment.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
